achievements.description: Defeat Android 17 as Piccolo in Stage 4 of Dragon World mode on Z2 difficulty.

achievements.title: The Champ is Here!
achievements.description: Defeat Cell as Hercule in Stage 4 of Dragon World mode on Z2 difficulty.

achievements.description: Have Vegeta and Majin Buu land on the same location in Stage 6 of Dragon World on Normal difficulty or higher.

achievements.description: Complete Stage 6 of Dragon World mode on Z difficulty without changing it.

achievements.title: City Defender
achievements.description: Complete Stage 8 of Dragon World mode on Normal difficulty or higher.

achievements.title: Fusion Rejected
achievements.description: Complete Stage 8 of Dragon World mode on Normal difficulty or higher without allowing Gohan to be absorbed by Buu or using fusion.

achievements.description: Complete Stage 8 of Dragon World mode on Z difficulty without changing it.

achievements.description: Defeat Super Buu as Gohan in Stage 8 of  Dragon World mode on Z2 difficulty.

achievements.title: The Final Battle
achievements.description: Defeat Kid Buu and complete Dragon World mode on Normal difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Dragon Ballin'
achievements.description: Collect all 7 Dragon Balls for the first time in Dragon World mode.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: The Final Battle - Z
achievements.description: Defeat Kid Buu and complete Dragon World mode on Z difficulty without changing it.

achievements.title: Novice Tournament Victory
achievements.description: [1P Only] Win the World Tournament on Novice difficulty with the normal ruleset and without using any custom skills.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Adept Tournament Victory
achievements.description: [1P Only] Win the World Tournament on Adept difficulty with the normal ruleset and without using any custom skills.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Advanced Tournament Victory
achievements.description: [1P Only] Win the World Tournament on Advanced difficulty with the normal ruleset and without using any custom skills.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Cell Games Victory
achievements.description: [1P Only] Win the World Tournament on Advanced difficulty with the "Cell Games" ruleset active.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Reclaim Your Title!
achievements.description: [1P Only] Win the World Tournament as Hercule on Advanced difficulty with the normal ruleset and without using any custom skills.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Am I Stronger Now?
achievements.description: Fuse into Gokule and win a match in Dueling mode. [1P vs COM, Normal difficulty, 60 seconds, 3 HP Bars]
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: A Critical Situation
achievements.description: Win a match in Dueling mode with your HP bars set to 1 and the opponent's set to 3. [1P vs COM, Normal difficulty,  60 seconds, no custom skills]
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: An Absorbing Battle!
achievements.description: Absorb someone as Super Buu and win a match in Dueling mode. [1P vs COM, Normal difficulty, 60 seconds, 3 HP Bars]
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Making the Best of It!
achievements.description: Fail the fusion dance and win using that form in a Dueling mode match. [1P vs COM, Normal difficulty, 60 seconds, 3 HP Bars]
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: NAAAAAAAAAAAAAAIL
achievements.description: As Piccolo in his first alt costume, defeat Frieza with Very Strong AI in Dueling mode. [1P vs COM, 60 seconds, 3 HP Bars]
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Resurrection F
achievements.description: Return as Mecha Frieza and defeat Trunks with Very Strong AI in Dueling mode. [1P vs COM, 60 seconds, 3 HP Bars]
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Change Now!
achievements.description: Win a match in Dueling mode against Goku by knock out after using Ginyu's body swap ability. [1P vs COM, Normal difficulty, 60 seconds, 3 HP Bars]
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Just Stay Down!
achievements.description: [1P Only] Defeat at least 10 enemies in Stage 1 of Babidi's Spaceship with normal skills.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Defensive Master
achievements.description: [1P Only] Survive at least 120 seconds in Stage 2 of Babidi's Spaceship with normal skills.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Offensive Master
achievements.description: [1P Only] Land at least 100 hits in Stage 3 of Babidi's Spaceship with normal skills.
achievements.author: NeonPug

achievements.title: Right Back At Ya
achievements.description: [1P Only] Reflect at least 100 ki blasts in Stage 4 of Babidi's Spaceship with normal skills.
achievements.author: NeonPug
